title: Chamaecrista schmitzii

At the genus level, it is a member of the genus Chamaecrista, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The species Chamaecrista schmitzii is native to Madagascar. It is a rare species within its genus, contributing to its classification as a unique entity in the plant kingdom.
